settings.title: Get Tax Year End Ready With Us
settings.excerpt: An early-evening session in March to help self-employed clients close the year without the last-minute panic.
settings.body:
The end of the tax year tends to arrive in a rush, and a rushed return is where mistakes creep in. A little preparation now saves a great deal of stress later.

On the evening of 19 March, Ledgerworks is hosting a practical session for self-employed clients. We will walk through a simple checklist of what to gather, what to set aside, and the deadlines worth marking now.

It runs for an hour with tea and questions afterward. Come with your records as messy as they are. Sorting them out together is exactly the point.
